sessions.objective: Reveal identity, project context, and response preferences.

turns.content: My name is Iris. I'm a operations manager in Sydney, Australia. Remember that I'm leading knowledge base overhaul.
Noted. I will keep that background in mind.
I prefer risk-first summaries and deep work blocks.
Understood. I will respond in that style.

sessions.objective: Introduce a canonical reference and leave an open loop.

turns.content: Use docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v1.md as the source of truth for knowledge base overhaul for now.
Okay. I will use that runbook as the current reference.
We paused after step 2 and still have an open loop on final verification for knowledge base overhaul. Continue from there next time.
Captured. I will continue from that open loop later.

sessions.objective: Correct stale information and ask for a memory-dependent answer.

turns.content: Correction: docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v2.md is now the source of truth, not docs/knowledge-base-overhaul-runbook-v1.md. Please update that.
Updated. I will use the newer runbook going forward.
Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, and the open loop before proposing the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
I can do that once I have the full remembered context.

feedback_signals.signal: The risk-first summaries format worked well. Keep using that style.

evaluation.prompt: Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, and the open loop before proposing the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
expected_history_signals: final verification for knowledge base overhaul
expected_non_transfer_signals: avoid irrelevant carry-over from hobby preferences
wrong_personalization_signals: avoid irrelevant carry-over from hobby preferences
evaluation.improvement_hypothesis: GoodMemory should beat baseline by recovering the user's role, corrected runbook, and open loop without extra user repetition.
evaluation.user_satisfaction_hypothesis: The agent should transfer durable user preferences into a new domain while still grounding the next step for knowledge base overhaul.
